auditToolchain.acquisition: npm pack exact version with scripts disabled
verification: verify package name and exact version
verify registry-reported integrity equals pinned value
recompute SHA-512 over downloaded tarball and compare to pinned value
install only the verified local tarball with scripts disabled
verify tsc reports the exact version
materialize the verified compiler for executable validation tests

requirements: all exact-head workflows succeed on an unchanged receipt-bearing SHA
root-lock artifact and hashes are independently verified before committing generated files
temporary root-lock controls are removed and the complete resulting head passes again
historical V1 generation and post-certification evidence is found and verified
dependency, SBOM, license, rights, consent, legal and exact-hash human review gates close
immutable promotion, deployment, rollback and live deployed-SHA evidence exists
